message.content: Building the new discount-rules engine this sprint. It lives inside the orders service and calls the pricing package in-process — tight loop, no network hop, because discount calc runs on every line item in the cart.

I'm assuming pricing stays an in-process package inside orders. The whole engine is built around calling it directly with no network round-trip per item — if pricing moves behind the network this design falls apart on latency.
Targeting end of next week to have the discount engine live in orders.
